reviews.review_description: My favorite part is all the different types of weapons and attachments
More glitches than guns, doesn’t save progress, only stage you can play is the shoot house.
Its a solid game game more content

reviews.review_title: It’s a great game, needs more content
reviews.review_description:
The game has great graphics and amazing sound  but it need more to do, in just 1 day I’ve unlocked all the guns and attachments so I have a few ideas. 

1. a holster for your pistol and rifle at least a spot to put a weapon I’m tierd of droping it and trying to crouch down to pick it up when I end up not even being able to get it so I have to walk all the way to the gun wall.

2. Being able to change the environment maybe being able to turn the lights off and you have to use a flashlight or night vision 

3. New attachments maybe a flashlight or extended mags for the pistols and the ars or fore-grips that help with recoil 

4. New weapons like a binary ar or pistol or a arp  

These are just some of my ideas I’d like to see implemented it’s an extremely fun game I’d just like to see it with more content

This game is actually pretty entertaining the supreser sounds amazing vary good for a free game now just add more to the game lots more guns maps this Def got potential just needs some bufs and it'll be pretty good
Maybe more on what to do like tutorial any new content for this game cuz it's solid good
